Hey guys and welcome to this final part of module two. This is the launch Bible and it's really a synthesis of everything we've done up to now and how we're gonna house and store all those insights in a way that's just a quick reference for us while we write our launch. So both for the emails, the landing pages, the sales pages, this little launch Bible is our main reference point for all those things as well as the document that I get sign-off on from a client when I'm doing when I'm doing client work. You know it's a lot harder to reiterate the process and change things up after you've already written like 20 emails on the sales page. So this is where I do get the sign-off, this is where I get the buy-in on the hooks I'm going for on my understandings of who this audience and market is and how I'm going to coach that conversion across the funnel. So if you are writing copy for clients I highly recommend you use the launch Bible as a paid deliverable or included if you're doing you know a full product launch but getting sign-off on this is gonna save you a lot of headaches it gets them clued in to your line of thinking before you start breaking ground on all the heavy writing. So with that said the first aspect of this that you're really going to synthesize is everything you've collected around your 3d avatar. So you're going to take everything you did from the 67 questions workbook particularly sections 1 to 3 and 6 and just give those high-level details about those relevant demographics those psychographics those ethos graphics the sources of exclusive empowerment and the sources of self forgiveness just have all that data handy over there you're also gonna take everything about that perfect buyer so we did that million dollar bed exercise individualizations we did the enrollment extractor in section 6 so here's where you're gonna want to channel that what have they accomplished as a source of exclusive empowerment what have they endured and overcome remember everything we spoke about markets search for meaning this is where you're gonna where you're gonna really put that in this housing document for quick reference what are they actively enduring what are they actively expressing and then what is it about you that makes them the perfect mentor for you so this is where we'll go back to section 4 of your 67 questions and then the pain and pleasure so what are those bleeding neck pain points so the ones that are most acute and ready to be addressed essentially that's causing the moment of highest tension so bleeding neck bleeding neck pain points bleeding necks always equal bigger checks so what that's a terribly cheesy pun but not even a pun I don't even know what that is but what I'm trying to get at is you want to identify where that pain is most acute because those are the ones you're gonna want to speak to you're also gonna want to talk about the sources of disillusionment we spoke about that the previous misfires you want to reflect that back to them you want them to get understanding of where those things have let them down before and this is the big exercise here that will really unlock the various layers of the wound for you so I call this the agitating the wound exercise and for these four areas so related to the outcome and the goal the process and the pursuit the personal level so how that wound is showing up for them and the interpersonal level how it's showing up for all the other stakeholders in their lives be that be that their employees their family their friends their kids whatever that looks like on an interpersonal level you're gonna want to explore that quadrant and then you're gonna address the wound from different layers so superficial what does it look like on the surface level so this is the immediately observable if there was a movie on this you can actually see how that plays out and then there is the subcutaneous soul level so this is hidden this is happening beneath the surface this is their inner experience of that wound filled with all the insecurities the doubts the negative self-talk all the fears associated with that that can't be shown on a screen that is the inner process and the more you actually address this level the more you go deeper into this wound that's what it means to agitate it to really dimensionalized it with that inner experience and their response on a felt emotional level that's where you really get to agitate that wound where you get to dig your fingers into it and play around with it if you want to get really kind of gruesome and graphic about it but we feel confident doing that because we're also going to be so kind as to stitch it up so what does it look like on all those four levels once that wound is stitched up you know how does it look different on that outcome goal level the process and pursuit personal and interpersonal so four different levels four different layers here if you will and when you really address them all and fill out these quadrants you have a really comprehensive summary of the various types of pains and how they appear on different levels then you're going to want to summarize all of this into that moment of highest tension we've done quite a few exercises on this already different angles and ways to enter that moment of highest tension but this is where I want you to really summarize it same thing with that moment of highest pleasure and then we're also going to have this summary list of those sacred cows so these are those paradigm shifts those conventions that no longer serve them that they'd be most willing to let go of if given a better alternative so we're going to give them permission to let go of the sacred cows list that corresponding shift and back that up with your most compelling reasons for them to believe that whether it's a case study or testimonial or your own experience so this is going to be a place to store all those things store all those things that we could go back to it efficiently when we write that section of the sales page then we want to just back that up and have a collection of additional reasons to believe so whenever I start a launch I just like to collect all these things up front so I'm not chasing a client later on just trying to chase them down for testimonials and case studies you want to kind of get as much of that upfront as you can so you don't stall your momentum later so any case studies or client stories that reinforce your messages above testimonials related to the outcome testimonials related to the process or your unique selling proposition or your method as well as that reinforce your experience and your bio of course this has to be relevant this is going to be a section of the sales page later and we're going to go deeper into what makes your experience relevant or not relevant but it essentially comes down to asking the so what question you know talk about an element of your experience but ask so what make sure it's related to building trust that you can deliver the result you promise section six summarizing that biggest outer outer edge of possibility promise so one big mistake I see a lot of people make is the promise is too big and out of reach and beyond any kind of possibility given where their client currently is so you want it to be exciting you want it to be something that invites resourcefulness and encourage that encourages them to pursue it but it has to be on that outer edge of possibility section seven is that big house so this is the part of your product or method that fulfills that big promise whereas all the other systems methods and products failed so this should have a very very very heavy tie in to your IP and what is it about your method that actually delivers that result the offer summary so this is going to be the crux of the product walk through section of your sales page and just a really handy way to have it all in front of you so module and feature that's going to be component number one you actually have a choice you can do this exercise right now as we're doing the launch as right now as we're doing the launch Bible sorry or you could revisit it when we talk about the product walk through later in this course but if you are doing it right now this is where I want you to just have that collection of modules or features of your program what the main promise or outcome of that component is elaborate on the benefit of that if you were selling that module or component alone how can you talk about it in such a way that that alone would be worth 10x the price of your course or your product and then the antithesis of that what are they going to continue to endure or experience if they don't have that so you want to be able to do this for each module or component you want to be able to position the value of each component as worth the price of admission so once again you can take a crack at this now if you do I recommend that you go into module five to really get the full context of how to walk through your product then we just have other offer fundamentals so this comes back down to having that information handy and not having to like go back for minor things here and there but you want to know the retail price you want to know the launch promotional price you want to know the payment options so just simple things that get overlooked and then you have to chase clients down for later which isn't fun for anybody bonuses I like to have the first bonus that presupposes success in the main one so that could be a kind of graduation gift you know something they're going to be able to use at the end point of where the main program or the main product leaves them another bonus I like to have is one that enables success in the main program so this could be any type of access Facebook groups coaching support live events anything that really amplifies their ability to get to get that main result and then of course you want to mention any other bonuses that your client is providing and then the golden guarantee elements this is the information you're going to need when it comes to writing your guarantee like simple stuff but once again you don't want to chase them down later when you're trying to get momentum so number of days on the guarantee specific tangible outcome that your prospect is going to be working towards in that time specific emotional outcome how they're going to feel how they need to feel in order for this to be worthwhile the specific person to contact for refund once again contact at so-and-so company is not specific enough to elicit trust so you want that to be specific person bonus points if it's someone other than the creator and we'll talk about that later in the course as to why but for now who is that person and of course any kind of refund eligibility requirements you know if they have to do the work be specific as to what work do they need to submit a certain workbook do they need to show evidence that they've installed your software and took certain actions within it so you do want to be specific in those eligibility requirements if you are going to make your client jump through hoops you have to be super clear as to what those hoops are and frame it in a way that it's for their benefit which it of course should be finally positioning what is the single biggest reason to believe this time will be different so there are many ways to talk about positioning but for me it all boils down to this one question you know a lot of your customers are going to be disillusioned for all the reasons we already spoke about what is the single biggest reason to believe that this time will be different and then you do want to have this final part of your launch Bible reserve for just tracking Q&A and potential objections we have different ways of gathering that if you did the enrollment extractor we have that source but this is also a place for you to just brainstorm and keep those things in mind it's an evolving living doc so as new things arise as you maybe engage with prospects on a live chat on your sales page this is where you could add these things in here and address them in future versions but you do want to keep a running list of that so with all that said this is the launch Bible it's a place to store all the data and insights you've already gathered up to this point and present it in a very easy to read way for your client to get sign off before doing the heavy lifting of writing a sales page or a full launch so get that done and I'll see you in the next module
